scripts.dev: pnpm -C ../.. exec concurrently -n preprocess,access-events,outbox,monitoring -c blue,magenta,green,cyan "pnpm --filter @school-gate/worker dev:preprocess" "pnpm --filter @school-gate/worker dev:access-events" "pnpm --filter @school-gate/worker dev:outbox" "pnpm --filter @school-gate/worker dev:monitoring"
scripts.dev:all: pnpm -C ../.. exec concurrently -n preprocess,access-events,outbox,retention,monitoring -c blue,magenta,green,yellow,cyan "pnpm --filter @school-gate/worker dev:preprocess" "pnpm --filter @school-gate/worker dev:access-events" "pnpm --filter @school-gate/worker dev:outbox" "pnpm --filter @school-gate/worker dev:retention" "pnpm --filter @school-gate/worker dev:monitoring"
scripts.start:all: pnpm -C ../.. exec concurrently -n preprocess,access-events,outbox,retention,monitoring -c blue,magenta,green,yellow,cyan "pnpm --filter @school-gate/worker start:preprocess" "pnpm --filter @school-gate/worker start:access-events" "pnpm --filter @school-gate/worker start:outbox" "pnpm --filter @school-gate/worker start:retention" "pnpm --filter @school-gate/worker start:monitoring"
